title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLV. Games.
content:
[In the following, the various parts of the countenance are touched as the lines are repeated; and at the close the chin is struck playfully, that the tongue may be gently bitten.]

        Eye winker,
        Tom Tinker,
                    Nose dropper.
        Mouth eater,
        Chin chopper,
            Chin chopper.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLV. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
